ogTitle: Magitup vs Mahomets Flats: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Magitup and Mahomets Flats.
heading: Magitup vs Mahomets Flats — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Magitup, Western Australia and Mahomets Flats, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mahomets Flats has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Magitup (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Magitup or Mahomets Flats safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Magitup has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Mahomets Flats scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Magitup scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Mahomets Flats scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Magitup or Mahomets Flats?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mahomets Flats has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
